criteriaCoverage.evidence: canSend true only when status=active && verified=true (unit covers all-false cases). onboarding-transitions.integration (real PG): SES PENDING->activate denied status stays onboarding; SES SUCCESS+required DNS->status active, verified=true, config_set set; canSend flips true only after SES-gated activation.

buildDnsRecordSet emits 3 DKIM CNAME + SPF TXT + MAIL FROM MX (feedback-smtp.<region>.amazonses.com prio10) + MAIL FROM SPF + recommended DMARC; start-domain-records asserts each+count+region. check-domain reports found/pending/mismatch from injected DNS+mocked SES.

compileMjml runs REAL mjml (throws on bad). buildTemplateUpsert stores both mjml+compiled_html bound workspace_id $1; template-storage.integration (real PG) stores both, idempotent on (workspace_id,name), no cross-workspace collision.
onboarding writes UPDATE WHERE id=$1 via workspace-tx runner; onboarding-workspace-scoping.integration activates wsA, wsB untouched (onboarding, verified false, config_set null), active count=1.

recommendations: Capture UPDATE rowCount===1 in the workspace-tx runner for a tighter scoping guarantee.
txtMatches accepts any v=DMARC1 as found regardless of policy (harmless, DMARC recommended-only).
Optional explicit real-PG test that deny path issues no UPDATE (already proven via mock capture + status-stays-onboarding).
